holdings.infoBox: IWR is an equity ETF with a total of 809 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 2.02%, Western Digital at 1.74%, Corning at 0.99%, Vertiv Holdings Co at 0.87%, and Howmet Aerospace at 0.82%.

overview.description: The iShares Russell Midcap ETF (IWR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell Midcap index, a market-cap-weighted index of the 800-smallest companies in the Russell 1000. IWR was launched on Jul 17, 2001 and is issued by BlackRock.
